extraction.one_line_summary: POGACAR attacked with 2km remaining on Luz Ardiden after INEOS pace-making, dropped VINGEGAARD and CARAPAZ by 2 seconds for third consecutive stage win
tactical_patterns: GAUDU and LATOUR broke clear 35km out on Tourmalet descent, exploiting INEOS tempo setting that neutralized dangerous moves.
POGACAR waits until MICHAL exhausts pacing duties sub-2km before attacking, refusing to respond to MASS probing move earlier.
CARAPAZ maintains GC podium despite lacking acceleration to follow POGACAR/VINGEGAARD, defending position rather than attacking for second.

rider_signals.GAUDU David: positive: opened minute gap on Tourmalet descent via positioning piloted by MADOUAS, showing descending aggressiveness
rider_signals.PORTE Richie: negative: dropped approaching Tourmalet, falling out of top-5 GC on critical mountain stage
rider_signals.RIGOBERTO Uran: negative: lost 9 minutes on stage, catastrophic collapse from fourth in GC to tenth overall
rider_signals.O'CONNOR Ben: positive: moved up into fourth GC with strong climbing performance while others faltered
rider_signals.MAS Enric: positive: attempted probing attack before Pogacar's winning move, rose to fourth on stage and improved GC position
rider_signals.CAVENDISH Mark: neutral: collected more green jersey points at intermediate sprint before Tourmalet eliminated him from stage contention
